replies.author: @samspurgeon4222
replies.text:
It's like Epstein. He tried to surround himself with people with wealth and power. Both would then identify the ones with "excessively different tastes" and would then provide those to them for future favors and/or blackmail opportunities.
     Lots of people went to Epstein's island or one of his other estates just to mingle with other rich and powerful people because that's just what they do. It's a way for them to meet in a social setting that could lead to future business deals, but not everyone who went were privy to the illegal side of things. It's the same with Diddy I believe. I could be wrong though, we'll have to wait and see when he gets his day in court.
